name: data-table-filter-list
title: Data Table Filter List
description: A filter list component for the data table.

0 && 'sr-only')}> {columnFilters.length > 0 ? 'Modify filters to refine your rows.' : 'Add filters to refine your rows.'}

{#if listFilters.length > 0}
    {#each listFilters as filter, index (getFilterKey(filter, index))} {@const filterKey = getFilterKey(filter, index)} {@const variant = getFilterVariant(filter)} {@const operator = getFilterOperator(filter)} {@const filterValues = getFilterValues(filter)} {@const allowsMultiple = variant === 'multiSelect' || operator === 'isAnyOf' || operator === 'isNoneOf'} {@const isSingleSelect = variant === 'select' && !allowsMultiple} {@const needsValue = !['isEmpty', 'isNotEmpty', 'isTrue', 'isFalse'].includes(operator)} {@const selectOptions = getColumnOptions(filter.id)}
  • {#if index === 0} Where {:else if index === 1} {:else} {joinOperator} {/if}
    {#snippet child({ props })} {/snippet} No fields found. {#each columns as column (column.id)} updateFilter(filterKey, { id: castColumnId(column.id), variant: column.variant, operator: getDefaultFilterOperator(column.variant), value: '' })} > {column.label} {/each}
    {#if needsValue} {#if variant === 'range' || (variant === 'number' && operator === 'isBetween')} updateFilter(nextFilterId, updates)} /> {:else if variant === 'number'} updateFilter(filterKey, { value: (event.currentTarget as HTMLInputElement).value })} class="h-8 w-full rounded" /> {:else if variant === 'date' || variant === 'dateRange'}
    filterValues.primary, (value) => setDateFilterValue(filterKey, filterValues, variant, operator, value) } class="h-8 w-full rounded" /> {#if variant === 'dateRange' || operator === 'isBetween'} filterValues.secondary, (value) => setDateFilterValue( filterKey, filterValues, variant, operator, value, true ) } class="h-8 w-full rounded" /> {/if}
    {:else if variant === 'boolean'}
    {:else if isSingleSelect && selectOptions.length > 0} {:else if (variant === 'select' || variant === 'multiSelect') && selectOptions.length > 0} {#snippet child({ props })} {/snippet} No options found. {#each selectOptions as option (option.value)} {@const isSelected = filterValues.values.includes(option.value)} updateFilter(filterKey, { value: allowsMultiple ? isSelected ? filterValues.values.filter( (value) => value !== option.value ) : [...filterValues.values, option.value] : option.value })} > {option.label} {/each} {:else} filterValues.primary, (value) => setScalarFilterValue(filterKey, value) } class="h-8 w-full rounded" /> {/if} {:else}
    {/if}

{/if}
